source.name: Ministero degli Affari Esteri — Financial means required for entry into Italy

requirements.label: Pre-enrolment on Universitaly
requirements.detail: Complete the pre-enrolment procedure on the Universitaly portal for your chosen course before the visa application.

requirements.label: University admission / enrolment
requirements.detail: Admission or enrolment confirmation from an Italian higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Proof of financial means
requirements.detail: Show at least €10,179.85 for the academic year (set yearly by ISTAT/the Foreign Ministry), excluding accommodation and return travel.

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Health cover valid in Italy for the visa period.

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: Italian (CILS/CELI) for Italian-taught programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the national (type D) visa period.

requirements.label: Proof of accommodation
requirements.detail: Evidence of where you'll stay in Italy is usually requested.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you an Italian number and data on landing.
